title: How to look up a value by both row and column (two-way lookup)
task: Find the cell at the intersection of a matching row label and a matching column label.
keywords: lookup row and column google sheets

excel.note: INDEX with two MATCHes: one finds the row, one finds the column.

explanation: INDEX(data, row_num, col_num) returns one cell of the data block. The first MATCH finds which row 'South' is in (row 2 of the block), the second finds which column 'Q2' is in (column 2). Their intersection is 40.
